title: Illustrator Needed for Story-Driven 20th Anniversary Catholic School Poster (Folk Art Style)
brief: Commemorative 20th Anniversary Poster Illustration John Paul the Great Academy, a Catholic classical school in Lafayette, Louisiana, is seeking an illustrator to create a commemorative 20th Anniversary poster celebrating the school's first twenty years. This is not a logo design, campus map, or marketing graphic. We are looking for a highly detailed, story-driven illustration that functions as a visual journey through the life of the school, incorporating faith, academics, student life, community traditions, and campus landmarks into a single cohesive composition. The finished artwork should feel handcrafted, meaningful, celebratory, and rich with discoverable details. Visual inspiration includes festival posters, folk-art illustration, screenprint aesthetics, and narrative poster design. A comprehensive creative brief is attached containing: - Artistic direction - Composition strategy - Campus maps and references - Required visual elements - Typography guidance - Deliverables and timeline - Visual inspiration examples Please review the attached full-length brief and all attached files before submitting a proposal. The creative brief, visual references, campus reference photos, and campus map work together as a single project package. When applying, please include: - Relevant illustration portfolio samples - Examples of poster, festival poster, folk-art, screenprint, or narrative illustration work - Confirmation that you can meet the project timeline outlined in the brief - A
